calibration_notes: My recent BEARISH next-day calls have been extremely accurate (100% on 11 predictions) with excellent price targeting, particularly on index ETFs where I've averaged <0.5% error. However, I've been running 80% confidence uniformly which doesn't match my 55% overall accuracy - I need to differentiate confidence based on setup quality. My intraday accuracy is 0% suggesting I'm misreading short-term momentum reversals in downtrends.
